tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Austin Peay Governors vs. Georgia Bulldogs: Full Highlights) 2025/09/06 ESHEET

videos.headline: Highlight: No. 4 Georgia defense stumps Austin Peay
videos.description: The Bulldogs hold the Governors to 196 total yards as Chauncey Bowens and Nate Frazier each find the end zone twice in a 28-6 victory.
